instructions: Write your email using all the notes.

task.subject: My library book
task.initialEmail: Hi,||I think I left my library book at your house yesterday. [1]Have you seen it anywhere?[/1]||[2]Could you bring it to school tomorrow if you find it?[/2] I need to return it before Friday.||[3]What was the homework for English?[/3] I forgot to write it down.||[4]Do you want to study together after school tomorrow?[/4]||Thanks||Ella

sampleAnswer.text: Hi Ella,||Thanks for your email. [1]Yes, I’ve seen your library book. You left it on the table in my bedroom after we finished our project yesterday.[/1]||[2]I’ll bring it to school tomorrow morning, so don’t worry. I’ll put it in my bag tonight so I don’t forget it.[/2]||[3]The English homework is to read chapter five and answer the questions on page thirty-two.[/3]||[4]I’m sorry, but I can’t study after school tomorrow because I have to help my dad at home.[/4]||See you tomorrow,||Max
